title: Cuter Happy Ghasts :3
description: OwO Happy Ghasts and uwu Ghastlings!
body:
OwO-ify your ghasts!

![owo ghast](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49b6ef4851406509c137ef5e122f895f5e377f4e.png)

Make Happy Ghasts a little bit cuter by giving them wide, sparkly eyes and a little cat-like mouth!

![3 happy ghasts being silly!!!!!!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/763bfde584d7bf0887926675e8b5e6fb17240108_0.webp)
